apps.title: Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter
apps.summary:
Become the ultimate invisible predator in the most realistic sniper game!

Welcome to Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter, the premier military offline experience where precision is the only thing between victory and defeat. As an elite ghost sniper, you are deployed into high-stakes missions across the globe. Experience intense 3D gun shooter action that demands tactical mastery and a steady hand in the heat of a total war strike.

🌍 Global Battlefields & Tactical Missions
This is not just another shooting gallery. Our action war game takes you to the world’s deadliest conflict zones:
• The Middle East (Iraq & Afghanistan): Engage targets in dusty urban labyrinths and guard strategic outposts in vast desert landscapes.
• Eastern Europe: Navigate the chilling atmosphere of abandoned cities and desolate industrial ruins.
• Africa: Neutralize threats across wide-open savannas and volatile border crossings.
• South & Central American Jungles: Hunt down guerilla insurgents in dense tropical foliage where every shadow hides a secret.

🎯 Advanced Physics & Realistic 3D Graphics
Experience a true 3D sniper simulation powered by a cutting-edge physics engine:
• True Ballistics: Master the art of the long shot. Calculate for wind speed, bullet drop (gravity), and target movement.
• Realistic Combat: High-fidelity animations and destructible environments make every war strike feel impactful.
• AAA Visuals: Console-quality textures and dynamic lighting bring the battlefield to life on your mobile device.

🔫 Deadly Arsenal & Customization
Choose your weapon from a massive collection of military-grade gear:
• Legendary bolt-action rifles, semi-auto snipers, and suppressed firearms for stealth operations.
• Deep Customization: Upgrade your scopes, magazines, barrels, and stocks to build the perfect tool for military shooting.

🛠 Key Game Features:
• Offline Shooter: No internet? No problem. Enjoy the full campaign anytime, anywhere.
• FPS Action: Immersive first-person perspective designed for maximum combat flow.
• Tactical Ops: Plan your approach, utilize cover, and remain a ghost until the mission is complete.
• Modern Warfare: Face a variety of enemies, from elite units to hidden guerilla cells.
• Free to Play: Experience the complete war game experience for free.

Join the ranks of the world's most elite marksmen. Download Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter now and prove you are the best shot in the business.

One shot, one kill. Leave no trace.

apps.title: Dynasty Match: Brain Puzzle
apps.summary:
Are you looking for a relaxing, anti-stress, and healing casual journey filled with oriental mystery? 🌸
Welcome to Dynasty Match: Brain Puzzle, a highly addictive shape-matching, organizing, and brain-teasing puzzle game! Step into a beautiful ancient world, use your logic and observation skills to restore order to chaos, and experience the ultimate satisfaction for perfectionists.
If you love organization games, ASMR sorting, item matching, spot the difference, and tricky brain puzzles, you will completely fall in love with this unique oriental casual trip!
🧩 HOW TO PLAY:
Observe the empty silhouettes and outlines in each level. Find the perfectly matching ancient artifacts from the scattered items below, and drag them into their exact designated spots. Listen to the crisp ASMR placement sounds and feel the immense healing and satisfaction of tidying up a messy room!
✨ GAME FEATURES:
👑 Royal Organization & Sorting: From the Emperor's messy study room to the Empress's exquisite jewelry box, organize hundreds of stunning antique treasures. Enjoy the satisfying thrill of sorting and putting things in their right place!
🎧 Immersive ASMR Relaxation: Soothing ambient sounds combined with the visual joy of neatness. Say goodbye to anxiety, relieve your daily stress, and relax your mind.
🧠 Fun Brain Training: More than just simple matching! Hidden clues and tricky logic puzzles will test your spatial awareness and observation skills, fully activating your brain.
🎨 Aesthetic Oriental Art: Exquisite hand-drawn 2D graphics blending traditional Asian aesthetics, gorgeous ancient costumes, and classic mythology.
Ready to train your brain, release stress, and satisfy your inner perfectionist? Download Dynasty Match: Brain Puzzle now, become the ultimate royal organizing master, and start your puzzle-solving adventure!

apps.title: RF ONLINE NEXT
apps.summary:
Triumph achieved through the blazing clash of steel and blood of thousands of war cries.
If you crave the exhilarating taste of victory,

gather now in The Ruthless Steel Sci-Fi MMORPG!
RF ONLINE NEXT

▣ Game Overview

■ RF ONLINE: NEXT, and Beyond ■
A grand space opera unfolding over eons against the backdrop of a vast universe.
In the next era, where machines have replaced flesh and blood, and the struggle for survival has become a way of life...
The saga of heroes, each forging their own path through a universe in chaos, begins now.
RF Online Next: the official successor carrying on the legacy of RF Online, beloved by 20 million players worldwide.
Join the battlefield now, on a scale unlike anything before.

■ Dominate the battlefield with the overwhelming firepower of giant mechs: Sacred Weapons. ■
Summon the ultimate weapon, armored with the majesty of steel, and become the terror of the battlefield.
The Launcher unleashes precise, devastating firepower, while the MAU charges forward, crushing enemy lines with overwhelming force.
Deploy them strategically to obliterate enemy defenses and cut off all routes of retreat.
And when the moment calls for it, summon the Animus, the ultimate Sacred Weapon of immense size and power,
to unleash transcendental might and seize control of the battlefield.

■ A planet-level threat descends: Large-scale World Boss Raids ■
A colossal terror blots out the horizon. Something no warrior can face alone has awakened.
Rally with your fellow mercenaries and charge into a battle of unprecedented scale.
Break through the boss's relentless onslaught and land the final blow. In that moment, the thrill of a victory that shakes the cosmos, and the spoils to match, will be yours.

■ Instincts on fire: Large-scale combat on a whole new level ■
The pinnacle of sci-fi MMORPGs where thousands of players clash at once: dive into the euphoria of massive PVP that turns the tide of war in an instant.
Tear through enemy defenses without mercy, and prove your strength in the desperate struggle where your faction's honor is on the line.
Rise from the chaos of battle and claim your place as the ultimate conqueror, a throne only the victorious can sit on.

■ Change classes freely without worrying about losing progress ■
Utilize the combat style you want!
With seven distinctive and appealing classes freely switchable via Biosuits,
and with your equipment and skill growth retained even in the heat of battle,
you can enjoy a wide range of combat styles by adapting to any situation, any strategy, and make every fight your own.

■ High-flying action, just as you imagined it ■
A new era of warfare unfolds through free flight in an expansive sci-fi universe!
Fly into the fray and unleash combo attacks with Sacred Weapons
to disrupt the enemy's strategy and seize victory!

And when the moment calls for it, summon the Animus, the ultimate Sacred Weapon of immense size and power,
to unleash transcendental might and seize control of the battlefield.

■ A planet-level threat descends: Large-scale World Boss Raids ■
A colossal terror blots out the horizon. Something no warrior can face alone has awakened.
Rally with your fellow mercenaries and charge into a battle of unprecedented scale.
Break through the boss's relentless onslaught and land the final blow. In that moment, the thrill of a victory that shakes the cosmos, and the spoils to match, will be yours.

■ Instincts on fire: Large-scale combat on a whole new level ■
The pinnacle of sci-fi MMORPGs where thousands of players clash at once: dive into the euphoria of massive PVP that turns the tide of war in an instant.
Tear through enemy defenses without mercy, and prove your strength in the desperate struggle where your faction's honor is on the line.
Rise from the chaos of battle and claim your place as the ultimate conqueror, a throne only the victorious can sit on.

■ Change classes freely without worrying about losing progress ■
Utilize the combat style you want!
With seven distinctive and appealing classes freely switchable via Biosuits,
and with your equipment and skill growth retained even in the heat of battle,
you can enjoy a wide range of combat styles by adapting to any situation, any strategy, and make every fight your own.

■ High-flying action, just as you imagined it ■
A new era of warfare unfolds through free flight in an expansive sci-fi universe!
Fly into the fray and unleash combo attacks with Sacred Weapons
to disrupt the enemy's strategy and seize victory!

apps.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
apps.summary:
NTE is a supernatural open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking.

Go at your own pace, follow your instincts, and let Hethereau reward you with colorful days worth remembering.
Follow our official channels for the latest on NTE!
Official Website: https://nte.perfectworld.com
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@NTE_Official
X: https://x.com/NTE_GL
Discord: https://discord.gg/nte
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@ntegame.official
Facebook: https://facebook.com/NTE.Official.Game
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ntegame.official/
Reddit: https://reddit.com/r/NevernessToEverness
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nte_global

apps.title: Red Command - War Alert RTS
apps.developer: TINYSOFT - slots, slot machines & casino games
apps.summary:
Alert commander, ww3 just began! Red threat is back! We need your command to conquer the red enemy once again. Show the enemy generals your art of war, command our units and lead us to victory in ww3 in this classic inspired RTS - real time strategy game.
The war has returned. Enemy forces are moving across the battlefield, rival generals are preparing their next strike, and every decision can change the future of the campaign. Take command, upgrade your army, strengthen your generals, and prove that your strategy and art of war can conquer every battlefield.
Red Command - War Alert RTS brings the spirit of classic war strategy into fast tactical battles made for mobile. Build your power, conquer the battlefield, lead your army, unlock new upgrades, and push through a full war campaign where smart decisions matter more than brute force.
BECOME THE COMMANDER
The battlefield needs a leader. As commander, you are responsible for every mission, every upgrade, and every victory. Plan your next move, improve your forces, and use your tactical sense to outplay enemy generals. The red enemy is strong, but a true commander knows how to turn pressure into victory.
UPGRADE POWERFUL GENERALS
Your generals are the key to victory. Upgrade their power, improve their abilities, and prepare them for harder missions. Every stronger general gives you more control over the battlefield and helps you conquer tougher rivals. Choose your upgrades wisely and build an army worthy of command.
CONQUER THE BATTLEFIELD
Every battle is a test of your strategy. Enemy units will try to break your advance, rival commanders will challenge your army, and new missions will demand better planning. Use your resources, improve your units, and conquer each battlefield step by step. Victory belongs to the commander who adapts.
CLASSIC WAR STRATEGY FEEL
Do you miss classic strategy games with soldiers, tanks, generals, upgrades, blue vs. red and large war campaigns? Red Command - War Alert RTS is built for players who love tactical decisions, army progression, battlefield action, and the feeling of commanding a real war machine.
This is a classic inspired strategy experience with modern mobile pacing. Easy to start, satisfying to progress, and challenging enough for players who want to master every mission.
REAL-TIME STRATEGY ACTION
Stay alert, because war does not wait. Battles move quickly, enemy forces react, and your command decisions happen in real time. Improve your army, conquer strong positions, use the right tactics, and push your forces toward victory. Every mission brings action, pressure, and the chance to prove your skill as a commander.
BUILD YOUR WAR MACHINE
A strong army is not created in one battle. Upgrade your units, improve your generals, collect rewards, and unlock more power as the campaign againts red enemy grows. The deeper you go, the stronger the red enemy becomes. Keep improving your strategy and prepare for the next strategy challenge.
FIGHT ENEMY GENERALS
You are not fighting simple soldiers. Enemy generals are leading their own armies and trying to stop your rise. Outsmart them, overpower them, and show them who controls the battlefield. Each victory brings you closer to total domination.
CONQUER THE LEADERBOARD
Conquer rivals and rise through the rankings. Upgrade your generals, complete missions, win battles, and prove that your command belongs among the best. The leaderboard is waiting for commanders who can combine smart strategy with unstoppable ambition.
WHY PLAY RED COMMAND - WAR ALERT RTS?
• Classic inspired war strategy gameplay
• Real-time tactical battles
• Generals to upgrade and command
• Army progression and powerful upgrades
• Soldiers, tanks, and battlefield action
• War campaign full of missions
• Competitive leaderboard progression
• Easy to play, hard to master
• Made for fans of classic RTS and war strategy games

Download now and become the commander your army needs.
